title: RoutineStep — http
description: HTTP request. Localhost requests automatically get the internal routine-runner bearer token. Templating applied to url, headers, query, and body.

body.description: Request body. JSON-serialized when Content-Type is application/json (default for POST/PUT/PATCH). Strings sent raw.

expect_json.description: true: parse response body as JSON and capture to steps.X.json. false: capture as stdout text.
